mapper.insert: INSERT INTO remote_control_sessions ( device_id, customer_id, user_id, session_token, status, session_type, started_at, remote_address ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{customerId}, #{userId}, #{sessionToken}, #{status}, #{sessionType}, COALESCE(#{startedAt}, NOW()), #{remoteAddress} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, d.number AS device_number, u.name AS user_name FROM remote_control_sessions s LEFT JOIN devices d ON s.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT s.*, d.number AS device_number, u.name AS user_name FROM remote_control_sessions s LEFT JOIN devices d ON s.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.session_token = #{sessionToken} AND s.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT s.*, d.number AS device_number, u.name AS user_name FROM remote_control_sessions s LEFT JOIN devices d ON s.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.device_id = #{deviceId} AND s.customer_id = #{customerId} AND s.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONNECTING', 'CONNECTED') ORDER BY s.started_at DESC

SELECT s.*, d.number AS device_number, u.name AS user_name FROM remote_control_sessions s LEFT JOIN devices d ON s.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.device_id = #{deviceId} AND s.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY s.started_at DESC

SELECT s.*, d.number AS device_number, u.name AS user_name FROM remote_control_sessions s LEFT JOIN devices d ON s.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY s.started_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE remote_control_sessions SET device_id = #{deviceId}, user_id = #{userId}, session_token = #{sessionToken}, status = #{status}, session_type = #{sessionType}, connected_at = #{connectedAt}, ended_at = #{endedAt}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, remote_address = #{remoteAddress}, error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO remote_control_audit ( session_id, device_id, customer_id, user_id, action, action_details, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{deviceId}, #{customerId}, #{userId}, #{action}, #{actionDetails}, NOW() )
